# Asymmetric Intelligence

> Polycrisis intelligence for asymmetric risk — monitoring systemic threats that compound across domains.

Asymmetric Intelligence operates seven interconnected monitors using a hub-and-spoke model. Each monitor runs a weekly intelligence cycle: automated collection, AI-assisted reasoning, expert synthesis, and structured publication. All data is published under CC BY 4.0.

## Monitors

| Monitor | Slug | Focus | Report (JSON) |
|---------|------|-------|---------------|
| World Democracy Monitor (WDM) | democratic-integrity | Electoral integrity, judicial independence, civil society, press freedom | [report-latest.json](https://asym-intel.info/monitors/democratic-integrity/data/report-latest.json) |
| Global Macro Monitor (GMM) | macro-monitor | Macro-economic stress, trade disruption, fiscal contagion, supply chain risk | [report-latest.json](https://asym-intel.info/monitors/macro-monitor/data/report-latest.json) |
| European Strategic Autonomy Monitor (ESA) | european-strategic-autonomy | EU defence, tech sovereignty, energy independence, institutional resilience | [report-latest.json](https://asym-intel.info/monitors/european-strategic-autonomy/data/report-latest.json) |
| FIMI & Cognitive Warfare Monitor (FCW) | fimi-cognitive-warfare | Foreign information manipulation, cognitive warfare campaigns, platform responses | [report-latest.json](https://asym-intel.info/monitors/fimi-cognitive-warfare/data/report-latest.json) |
| Artificial Intelligence Monitor (AIM) | ai-governance | AI governance, compute concentration, regulatory divergence, safety frameworks | [report-latest.json](https://asym-intel.info/monitors/ai-governance/data/report-latest.json) |
| Environmental Risks Monitor (ERM) | environmental-risks | Climate tipping points, biodiversity loss, resource scarcity, environmental policy | [report-latest.json](https://asym-intel.info/monitors/environmental-risks/data/report-latest.json) |
| Strategic Conflict Escalation Monitor (SCEM) | conflict-escalation | Active conflicts, escalation trajectories, theatre-level risk, f-flag indicators | [report-latest.json](https://asym-intel.info/monitors/conflict-escalation/data/report-latest.json) |

## Cross-Monitor Intelligence

Monitors share intelligence through Cross-Monitor Flags (CMFs) — structured signals that link developments across domains. The network graph at [/network/](https://asym-intel.info/network/) visualises these connections. The world map at [/map/](https://asym-intel.info/map/) shows geographic coverage across all monitors.

## Data Access

Each monitor publishes structured JSON reports weekly:
- `report-latest.json` — current week's full analysis
- `persistent-state.json` — living knowledge base (accumulated findings)
- Weekly briefs at `/monitors/{slug}/` — narrative summaries

## About

Published by [Peter Howitt](https://ramparts.gi/people/peter-howitt/).
Content is published under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
